title: Overseer Config
description: Configuration for overseer — a personal CLI for machine bootstrap and daily automation. Two files are merged: brain/overseer/config.yaml (shared, portable) and ~/.config/overseer/config.local.yaml (machine-local overrides). Secret fields accept op:// references resolved at runtime via the 1Password CLI.

secrets.description: 1Password environment mappings. Maps a short alias to a 1Password account ID, used in secrets.RunWithEnv calls.

environments.description: Map of alias → 1Password account ID (e.g. { "work": "YUJYMY4HLFBKNHT4GO5URMOKIY" }). Run: overseer accounts to find your IDs.

plugins.description: Native plugin overrides. Keys are plugin names (e.g. "jira", "slack", "claude"). Use to explicitly enable or disable a plugin independent of its integration config.

integrations.description: Third-party integration configurations. Each integration supports multiple named instances.

git.description: Git identity profiles and shared defaults. Profiles inherit from defaults; any field can be overridden per profile.

system.description: Machine-specific overrides. Lives in config.local.yaml, never committed to the brain repo.

gpg_ssh_program.description: Path to the SSH program used for GPG signing (e.g. /usr/local/bin/op-ssh-sign).

repos_path.description: Absolute path to the directory where managed repositories are cloned.

brain_path.description: Absolute path to the brain directory. Overrides brain.path for this machine.

ide.description: Default IDE command used by `overseer repos open --ide` (e.g. "code", "idea"). Overridden per repo via repos[].ide.

notifications.description: When true, fire native desktop notifications when long-running commands (daily, standup, repos pull) complete.

brain.description: Brain directory settings. The brain is a private git repo holding your personal overseer config and scripts.

path.description: Canonical brain path, may use ~ (e.g. ~/brain). Overridden per machine by system.brain_path.

url.description: Git remote URL for pulling/cloning the brain repo.

git_profile.description: Name of the git profile (from git.profiles) to use for brain commits.

vault_path.description: Path to the Obsidian vault. Relative paths are resolved from system.repos_path.

vault_name.description: Vault name as registered in the Obsidian app (used for obsidian:// URI scheme). Defaults to the directory basename.

daily_notes_folder.description: Folder inside the vault for daily notes (e.g. "06 - Daily").

templates_folder.description: Folder inside the vault for note templates (e.g. "99 - Meta/_templates").

default_folder.description: Default destination folder when creating new notes. Empty string means vault root.

brewfile.description: Path to the Brewfile, relative to system.repos_path. Defaults to "Brewfile".

env.description: Named environment variable profiles. Use `overseer env use <name>` to emit export statements for a profile.

ssh.description: Named SSH config profiles. Use `overseer ssh use <name>` to activate a profile and `overseer ssh setup` to wire the Include directive.

repos.description: List of git repositories managed by overseer. Used by: overseer repos status/pull.

opRef.description: A 1Password secret reference (op://vault/item/field) or a plain string value.

name.description: Short identifier for this Jira instance (e.g. "work").

email.description: Jira account email. Accepts an op:// reference.

token.description: Jira API token. Accepts an op:// reference.

op_account.description: 1Password account ID to use when resolving op:// references. Run: overseer accounts to find your IDs.

name.description: Short identifier for this Slack workspace (e.g. "work").

token.description: Slack bot OAuth token. Accepts an op:// reference.

op_account.description: 1Password account ID to use when resolving op:// references.

name.description: Short identifier for this Google account (e.g. "personal").

credentials_doc.description: op:// reference to a 1Password Document containing the OAuth2 credentials JSON from Google Cloud Console.

op_account.description: 1Password account ID to use when resolving op:// references.

name.description: Short identifier for this GitHub account (e.g. "personal").

token.description: GitHub Personal Access Token. Accepts an op:// reference.

op_account.description: 1Password account ID to use when resolving op:// references.

show_issues.description: When true, open GitHub Issues assigned to the user are surfaced in overseer daily.

name.description: Short identifier for this GitLab instance (e.g. "work").

base_url.description: GitLab instance base URL. Defaults to https://gitlab.com.

token.description: GitLab Personal Access Token. Accepts an op:// reference.

op_account.description: 1Password account ID to use when resolving op:// references.

gitDefaults.description: Shared git identity settings inherited by all profiles. Any field can be overridden per profile.

user_name.description: Default git user.name across all profiles.

gpg_ssh_program.description: Path to the SSH signing helper (e.g. /usr/local/bin/op-ssh-sign). Overrides system.gpg_ssh_program.

commit_gpgsign.description: Whether to sign commits by default.

gitProfile.description: A named git identity. Fields left empty inherit from git.defaults.

name.description: Unique profile name used to reference this profile in repos and brain config.

signing_key.description: SSH public key or GPG key ID for commit signing. Accepts an op:// reference.

user_name.description: git user.name override. Leave empty to inherit from git.defaults.user_name.

gpg_format.description: GPG format override for this profile: "ssh" or "openpgp".

gpg_ssh_program.description: SSH signing helper path override for this profile.

op_account.description: 1Password account ID used to resolve op:// references in this profile.

claudeIntegration.description: Claude AI API integration. Used by `overseer claude teams consult` and AI-enhanced commands.

api_key.description: Anthropic API key. Accepts an op:// reference.

default_team.description: Default team slug to use when --team is not specified.

daily_ai_summary.description: When true, append a 3-sentence AI-generated summary to `overseer daily` output.

pluginSettings.description: Enable or disable a specific native plugin.

enabled.description: Explicitly enable (true) or disable (false) this plugin.

envProfile.description: A named set of environment variables emitted as export statements by `overseer env use`.

op_account.description: 1Password account ID used to resolve op:// references in vars.

vars.description: Map of environment variable names to values. Values may be op:// references resolved at runtime.

sshProfile.description: A named SSH config snippet written verbatim to the active SSH config file on `overseer ssh use`.

config.description: Raw SSH config block (Host entries, etc.) written verbatim to the active SSH config file.

repoConfig.description: A git repository managed by overseer.

name.description: Display name for this repo. Used as the clone directory name when folder is set.

url.description: Git remote URL used for cloning.

folder.description: Subdirectory under system.repos_path where this repo is cloned. Clone target becomes repos_path/folder/name. Ignored when path is set.

path.description: Full clone destination override, relative to system.repos_path (or absolute). Takes precedence over folder.

readonly.description: When true, overseer skips push and warns on local changes.

git_profile.description: Profile name from git.profiles to apply after cloning.

ide.description: IDE command for this repo (e.g. "idea"). Overrides system.ide for `overseer repos open --ide`.
